use_cases: Quick action search for command palettes in productivity apps
Keyboard shortcut-driven navigation for developer tools
Unified search interface for SaaS platforms with multiple actions
Voice and video tool launchers for creator applications
Multi-purpose action launcher with filtered results
ai_summary: A sleek command palette component with debounced search functionality, action selection, and keyboard shortcut support. Features animated transitions using Framer Motion, color-coded Lucide icons, and interactive hover states. Designed for desktop and mobile use, making it ideal for SaaS platforms, developer tools, and creative applications requiring quick action invocation.
